rationale: Faithful Task 4a AS-IS within frozen v15 (AM-40/AM-41) scope. inventory.mjs commits exact PACKAGE_ROOTS + PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE with tracked package.json completeness unit; DOC_ROOTS/exclusions; sorted CONTRACT_FILES; five weavers with integer versions; REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS deep-equal to the frozen normative table with freeze/mutation units; LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS exact {module,node:module}→[builtinModules,isBuiltin] deep-frozen with equality/mutation units; WEAVER_IMPL_FILES only for git+code (D17/AM-17) naming only existing files equal to derived D33 closures. util.mjs is the single shared D33 classifier+resolver (AM-34 test 19), AM-41 fail-closed profile (b1–b6 + leading shebang), original-component containment, Phase-1 export scanner, real-file walker, D26/D29 counted iterator (driver-held accessor only), D21 physicalContainment, and no-shell git allowlist. test-closure proves inventory==derived closure via shared machinery and covers all accepted forms plus fatal/no-edge modes. git.mjs uses exact -S and path-scoped log shapes, first SHA, git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warns. code.mjs emits all four depends-on endpoint shapes with symbol/file threading, unrepresentable only for unresolvable, unused/no-edge, dedup. Zero runtime deps, ESM, node:/clotho-relative only, spine read-only; gate finalStatus meets. No scope expansion into 4b/5 (orchestrator, D34, test/doc/ledger weavers).
